_meta.scope: Chicagoland / Illinois ONLY. Boston / Massachusetts parked (0 MA rows).
_meta.disposition_vocab: MAIN_AO allowed set (ready_for_validation / hold_* / rejected / refuted); each row also carries disposition_protocol_equivalent mapping to the coordination-protocol output-contract vocab (merge_eligible_new / corroborates_existing_ready / hold_* / refuted)
notes: DSO=STRUCTURE enforced: T4/T5 only with a documented MSO/management-company/platform/established DSO brand. pe_backed is orthogonal (pe_backed=false is never a downgrade reason).
true_independent (T1) promotions carry EARNED positive owner-operated evidence (named sole-owner dentist + own practice/website) — never defaulted.
AH3: all evidence URLs were transcribed in Wave 4 (this session). DB artifacts (db_affiliated_dso) are whitelisted-durable and are corroborated by freshly-transcribed Wave-4 structural URLs.

Two Heartland NAME COLLISIONS resolved as institutional FQHC/nonprofit (Heartland International Health Center = Tapestry 360 FQHC; Heartland Health Outreach = Heartland Alliance) — explicitly NOT Heartland Dental.
